turns.q: How long does delivery usually take once it ships?

you the right shipping timeline, please log in so we can access your order details. In general, orders typically ship within about 3 business days, and tracking is sent once the carrier scans the package. During peak periods, order prep can take 7 to 10 business days.

turn policy?

08:31 PM

Once it ships, standard U.S. delivery usually takes 5 to 6 business days. Fast shipping usually takes 2 to 3 business days, and fastest shipping usually takes 1 to 2 business days. International delivery generally takes about 7 to 11 business days after fulfillment.

turns.q: Do you ship internationally, and who covers customs or duties?
turns.replyTail:
stoms or duties?

08:33 PM

Yes, we do ship internationally 😊 International orders are shipped with DHL Express, and duties and taxes are itemized in the order. Shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on the destination, and international orders are not eligible for free shipping.

turns.q: My discount code isn't applying at checkout — what are the usual reasons?
turns.replyTail:
subscription items, an e-gift card, or a bundled set
• If you copied and pasted the code, make sure there are no extra spaces before or after it

If the code should be valid, try clearing your browser cache, using a desktop browser, or opening checkout in an incognito or private window 💛
